task: Pick up the green cup, place it on the bottom shelf, pick up the pink cup from the second shelf from the bottom and place it on the bottom shelf to the left of the green cup
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A green cup and a pink cup are on a white countertop. The green cup is on the left, the pink cup is on the right. Both cups are rigid, cylindrical, and have handles. The task requires picking the green cup, placing it on the bottom shelf, then picking the pink cup from the second shelf and placing it to the left of the green cup on the bottom shelf. The bottom shelf is a storage area below the countertop. STRATEGY - First, reach for the green cup, grasp it, transport it to the bottom shelf, and place it. Then, reach for the pink cup, grasp it, transport it to the bottom shelf, and place it to the left of the green cup. Failure modes include dropping the cup during transport or misplacing it on the shelf. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the green cup at its body. Step 2: Grasp the green cup at its handle. Step 3: Transport the green cup to the bottom shelf. Step 4: Place the green cup on the bottom shelf. Step 5: Reach for the pink cup at its body. Step 6: Grasp the pink cup at its handle. Step 7: Transport the pink cup to the bottom shelf. Step 8: Place the pink cup to the left of the green cup on the bottom shelf.

Goal: on(green_cup, bottom_shelf); on(pink_cup, bottom_shelf); left_of(pink_cup, green_cup)
Scene: green_cup, pink_cup, countertop, bottom_shelf
Step 1: reach(green_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the green cup
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_cup, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_cup) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_cup)
  affordance_region: the handle of the green cup
  contact: holding(green_cup) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_cup)
Step 3: transport(green_cup -> bottom_shelf)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the bottom shelf
  spatial: above(green_cup, bottom_shelf, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_cup)
  done_when: above(green_cup, bottom_shelf, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_cup -> bottom_shelf)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the bottom shelf
  contact: surface_contact(green_cup, bottom_shelf) [completion]; released(green_cup) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_cup) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_cup, bottom_shelf) AND released(green_cup)
Step 5: reach(pink_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink cup
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_cup, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_cup) < 0.03
Step 6: grasp(pink_cup)
  affordance_region: the handle of the pink cup
  contact: holding(pink_cup) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_cup)
Step 7: transport(pink_cup -> bottom_shelf)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the bottom shelf to the left of the green cup
  spatial: above(pink_cup, bottom_shelf, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_cup)
  done_when: above(pink_cup, bottom_shelf, 0.05)
Step 8: place(pink_cup -> bottom_shelf)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the bottom shelf to the left of the green cup
  contact: surface_contact(pink_cup, bottom_shelf) [completion]; released(pink_cup) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_cup) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_cup, bottom_shelf) AND released(pink_cup)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green cup
the handle of the green cup
an empty area on the bottom shelf
an empty area on the bottom shelf
the body of the pink cup
the handle of the pink cup
an empty area on the bottom shelf to the left of the green cup
